data.source: Open-Meteo daily temperature extremes (>95F or <20F) + Google Trends weekly 'air conditioner repair', 'furnace repair' searches via google_trends adapter

schema.behavior: Extreme temperature events combined with HVAC repair search surges signal replacement cycle acceleration, driving demand for electrical equipment, installation labor, and utility infrastructure upgrades.

market_impact.rationale: HVAC replacement drives electrical grid demand, utility capex, and peak demand pricing pressure.

trade_logic.entry: If temperature extreme occurs + weekly HVAC search index >140% of median within same week, go long XLU
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if search index normalizes and temperatures moderate

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Extreme heat/cold events occur seasonally; winter and summer temperature swings reliably trigger HVAC repair searches multiple times per year.
